rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER JEW ART LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses
rulings.Rulings: No opposition having been filed, respondent's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories set #2, special interrogatories set #1, and request for production of documents set #1 is granted. Petitioner Donald Lee is ordered to provide complete responses without objection within 14 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $360.00, to be paid within 14 days of notice of this order. (610/CHAN)
